steps.title: Find the needed plural subject
steps.content: The blank follows ‘because’ and comes before the verb ‘are’, so it must be a plural subject pronoun that stands in for ‘the thirty‑eight languages’.

steps.title: Match the plural subject to the choices
steps.content: Only ‘they’re’ provides the plural subject ‘they’ (they are) to match ‘are descendants’. The other three either give a singular subject (‘its’, ‘it’s’) or a possessive form (‘their’), which cannot serve as the subject of ‘are’. That matches choice B — B is correct.
